items.title: Accordion for polished editorial systems
items.content: Turns editorial material into a polished reading surface with compact hierarchy, clear affordances, and shadcn token rhythm. This accordion example includes realistic content for browser review.

items.title: Accordion for polished editorial systems
items.content: Gives content teams practical copy, useful metadata, and responsive density that works across long-form pages and compact previews. This accordion example includes realistic content for browser review.

items.title: Accordion for polished editorial systems
items.content: Keeps stories, resources, and supporting media calm, scannable, and ready for production review. This accordion example includes realistic content for browser review.
